title: Proclamation No. 1970, s. 2009
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 1970

CREATING AND DESIGNATING CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN LOCATED AT BARANGAY AIRPORT, MANDURRIAO DISTRICT, ILOILO CITY AS AN INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK KNOWN AS ILOILO BUSINESS PARK, PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon the recommendation of the Board of Director of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 08-562 dated 10 November 2008 of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, the Iloilo Business Park as an Information Technology Park which shall be established on certain parcels of land of the private domain located at Barangay Airport, Mandurriao District, Iloilo City, containing an aggregate area of Five Hundred Forty Four Thousand Seven Hundred Thirty Nine (544,739) Square Meters , more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

“Consolidation of Lots 2109-A & 2110-B-1, Psd-63151; Lots 3004-A & 3005-A, Psd-63152; and Lot 2110-A-1, Psd-63153

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being N. 55 deg. 45′ E., 8.21 meters from BLLM No. 1, Iloilo Cad. 22;

thence S. 84 deg. 16′ W., 50.00 m. to point 2; thence S. 84 deg. 16′ W., 76.14 m. to point 3; thence N. 23 deg. 37′ E., 292.77 m. to point 4 thence N. 23 deg. 08′ E., 135.95 m. to point 5 thence N. 24 deg. 19′ E., 63.45 m. to point 6 thence N. 36 deg. 07′ E., 35.60 m. to point 7 thence N. 46 deg. 33′ E., 47.03 m. to point 8 thence S. 20 deg. 04′ E., 77.96 m. to point 9 thence S. 29 deg. 02′ E., 90.00 m. to point 10; thence S. 23 deg. 37′ W., 200.00 m. to point 11 thence S. 23 deg. 06′ W., 156.54 m. to point 12 thence S. 09 deg. 09′ E., 14.90 m. to point 13 thence S. 84 deg. 20′ W., 58.00 m. to point of

beginning; containing an area of SEVENTY ONE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED NINE (71,709) SQUARE METERS , more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and are marked on the ground. All new corners are PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 40 cms. All corners not otherwise described are old PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cms., bearings true; date of consolidation survey December 02, 2008 and approved on May 18, 2009.

Consolidation of Lots 2325 to 2331, 2514, 2516 to 2520, Iloilo Cadastre; Lots 2305-A & 2305-B, Psd-28083; Lot 2321-A, Psd-68398; Lot 2322-A, Psd-66644; Lot 2324-A-1, Psd-68769; Lot 2515-A, Psd-66611; Lot 2521-A, Psd-68423; and Lot 3023-A, Psd-66511

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being S. 09 deg. 27′ E., 113.78 meters from BLLM No. 1, Agonoa Cad. 8;

thence S. 82 deg. 05′ W., 33.53 m. to point 2; thence N. 84 deg. 20′ E., 33.47 m. to point 3; thence S. 06 deg. 34′ E., 12.25 m. to point 4; thence S. 15 deg. 53′ E., 11.48 m. to point 5; thence S. 17 deg. 49′ E., 34.32 m. to point 6; thence S. 23 deg. 24′ E., 41.48 m. to point 7; thence S. 65 deg. 04′ W., 20.11 m. to point 8; thence N. 28 deg. 44′ W., 18.18 m. to point 9; thence S. 81 deg. 23′ W., 16.21 m. to point 10; thence S. 22 deg. 12′ W., 107.46 m. to point 11; thence S. 22 deg. 12′ W., 110.00 m. to point 12; thence S. 25 deg. 30′ W., 95.71 m. to point 13; thence N. 31 deg. 26′ W., 44.71 m. to point 14; thence N. 33 deg. 32′ W., 31.41 m. to point 15; thence N. 72 deg. 24′ W., 34.15 m. to point 16; thence N. 72 deg. 24′ E., 60.34 m. to point 17; thence N. 06 deg. 39′ E., 1.81 m. to point 18; thence N. 40 deg. 27′ E., 52.29 m. to point 19; thence N. 78 deg. 37′ W., 20.00 m. to point 20; thence N. 23 deg. 09′ E., 216.55 m. to point 21; thence N. 75 deg. 25′ E., 30.00 m. to point 22; thence N. 74 deg. 07′ E., 91.50 m. to point 23; thence S. 74 deg. 59′ W., 124.50 m. to point 24; thence N. 26 deg. 39′ E., 68.51 m. to point 25; thence N. 24 deg. 49′ E., 153.51 m. to point 26; thence N. 27 deg. 04′ E., 37.74 m. to point 27; thence S. 20 deg. 14′ E., 25.00 m. to point 28; thence S. 17 deg. 38′ E., 15.74 m. to point 29; thence S. 17 deg. 16′ E., 35.05 m. to point 30; thence S. 16 deg. 25′ E., 10.23 m. to point 31; thence S. 13 deg. 55′ E., 10.93 m. to point 32; thence S. 15 deg. 09′ E., 15.77 m. to point 33; thence S. 14 deg. 17′ E., 30.43 m. to point 34; thence S. 13 deg. 01′ E., 19.68 m. to point 35; thence S. 17 deg. 59′ E., 18.68 m. to point 36; thence S. 15 deg. 22′ E., 20.87 m. to point of

beginning; containing an area of SEVENTY ONE THOUSAND TWENTY (71,020) SQUARE METERS , more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and are marked on the ground. All new corners are PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 40 cms. All boundary corners are old PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cms., bearings true; date of consolidation survey December 02, 2008 and approved on May 18, 2009.

Consolidation of Lots 3112 to 3121; 3126, 3127, 3129, 3131, 3132, 3142, 3143, 3188, 3197 to 3200, 3261 and 3232, Iloilo Cadastre; Lots 3124- B-2 to 3124-B-4, 2125-B, Psd-21713; Lots 3128-A, 3130-A, 3136-A, 3136-B, Psd-56373; Lots 3178-B-1-A, 3182-A, 3183-C- 1, Psd-56525; Lot 3182-A, Psd-56526; Lot 3183-B-1, Psd-52283, Lot 3260-A, Psd-55301 and Lot 3264-A, Psd-64801

thence S. 23 deg. 49′ W., 93.81 m. to point 72; thence S. 72 deg. 43′ W., 35.18 m. to point 73; thence N. 14 deg. 05′ W., 11.70 m. to point of

beginning; containing an area of FOUR HUNDRED TWO THOUSAND TEN (402,010) SQUARE METERS , more or less. All points referred to are indicated on plan and are marked on the ground. All new corners are PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 40 cms. All boundary corners are old points. Bearings true; date of consolidation survey December 02, 2008 and approved on May 18, 2009.”

IN WITNESS THEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 29th day of December , in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Nine.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) EDUARDO R. ERMITA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
